engine.ladder_reasoning: A real-estate agency sells brokerage expertise — the thin about/servizi copy leans on client-first service, discretion, professionalism, free consultation and dedicated mortgage staff, i.e. trusting a firm. The listings grid is browse inventory, not the persuasion argument.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to search/browse listings and then contact the agency (call, contact form, or request a free valuation) about buying/selling

structure.archetype_note: Real-estate MLS/CMS portal (Web-Burning.it platform): every page carries a multi-facet property-search widget; VENDITA/AFFITTO are paginated live-inventory listing grids (~50+ properties). Marketing copy is thin; the search engine and inventory are the spine.

mapped.observed_as: top nav (HOME / STUDIO / SERVIZI / VENDITA / AFFITTO / CONTATTI)
STUDIO IMMOBILIARE DUERRE + property search widget
STUDIO IMMOBILIARE DUERRE about paragraph (client-first, discretion, free consultation)
Servizi (free valuations, negotiation/discretion, dedicated mortgage staff)
VALUTAZIONI GRATUITE (link to Tally free-valuation form)
Contatti: office address + 3 phones + email + Google Maps embed

unmapped.observed: Ricerca Immobili — multi-field property search widget (contract type, property type, comune, locality, code, rooms, price range) filtering live inventory, repeated on every page
unmapped.why_no_fit: Not a lead-form (no capture/inquiry) and not a hero CTA — it is a faceted search engine over listing inventory; no canonical section id represents an inventory-search facet

unmapped.observed: Immobili in Vendita — paginated grid of 12 listing cards/page x5 pages, each with price/type/town/size/rooms
unmapped.why_no_fit: A browsable inventory result set with pagination, not a fixed marketing pricing/features grid
Category taxonomy navigation into inventory, not a canonical marketing section

proposed_new.name: inventory-search
proposed_new.evidence: A multi-facet search widget (contract type, property type, comune, locality, code, rooms, price range) filtering a live real-estate inventory, repeated on every page, driving paginated result grids over ~50+ properties — a faceted search engine over inventory, distinct from a static browsable catalog.

components_needed: contact form (reason dropdown + captcha + privacy consent)

confidence.why: fetch_quality is 'rendered' not 'full' (curl was WAF-blocked); content captured well but design hints (fonts/colors/theme) are empty, so design_style is inferred. Business function and structure are clear.

gap_findings: This is a real-estate listings PORTAL with a faceted search over live inventory and paginated result pages — not a single-conversion-action site; the 5 closed engines assume one page arguing one offer and cannot express a browse-search-inquire MLS.

Closed capability 'catalog' captures a static browsable list but not a multi-field inventory SEARCH engine (contract type/comune/price/rooms) that filters and paginates live listings — hence proposed 'inventory-search'.
No canonical section id exists for a repeated inventory-search facet or a paginated listings result grid; both were logged unmapped.
Zero proof of any kind (no testimonials/certs/reviews) despite being a trust-engine business — a real-estate trust site with no trust signals.
